steps.title: Use the calmer-water clue
steps.content: Kelp forests slow powerful currents, creating calmer waters where animals can shelter. The blank must describe an environment that is peaceful and safe compared with rough currents.

steps.title: Reject mismatched meanings
steps.content: Choice A means unexpected, Choice C means creative, and Choice D means hazardous. The word meaning peaceful matches the calmer sheltering waters. The answer is B.
